raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section chains numeric comparisons into a SOTA conclusion; verifying that each inferential step (accuracy delta, F1 delta, per-attack generalisation claim) is logically sound is central if the task is any form of critical review.","R1.3":"The artifact is an empirical results section whose credibility rests entirely on whether stated numbers support stated conclusions; evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing whenever the task touches correctness rather than style.","R1.6":"The delegation 'help me with this section' most commonly signals a writing-quality request; sentence construction, flow, and clarity are plausibly the primary ask."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Do you want me to (a) improve the prose and sentence-level writing quality of this section, or (b) check that the numerical claims and SOTA conclusions are logically consistent with the reported results?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section chains numeric comparisons into a SOTA conclusion; verifying that each inferential step (accuracy delta, F1 delta, per-attack generalisation claim) is logically sound is central if the task is any form of critical review.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact is an empirical results section whose credibility rests entirely on whether stated numbers support stated conclusions; evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing whenever the task touches correctness rather than style.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'help me with this section' most commonly signals a writing-quality request; sentence construction, flow, and clarity are plausibly the primary ask.

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want me to (a) improve the prose and sentence-level writing quality of this section, or (b) check that the numerical claims and SOTA conclusions are logically consistent with the reported results?
